name: Aidoku Source
subtitle: Home of Aidoku, free and open source manga reader for iOS and iPadOS
description:
This is the AltStore Source for Aidoku, free and open source manga reader for iOS and iPadOS.

For full details on what's included, check the website: https://aidoku.app/

apps.name: Aidoku
apps.subtitle: Free and open source manga reader for iOS and iPadOS
apps.localizedDescription: A free and open source manga reading application for iOS and iPadOS.

privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Aidoku needs FaceID permissions for user-defined settings
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Aidoku needs permission to save pages in your photo library
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Aidoku needs permission to connect to local Komga servers

versions.localizedDescription:
• New icon: updated for liquid glass.
• Fluid transitions: Aidoku now fits in with more iOS 26 apps, letting you swipe to close the reader and other views.
• Insights: reading time is now tracked (starting from this update), and you can see reading statistics in the insights page.
• Library improvements: list mode, additional filter options, persistent filters, and improved multi•select.
• Auto reader background color option: determine the reader background based on page color.
• Live Text support: copy text and use Apple's built in image text translation feature by pressing the live text icon in the bottom right corner of page images.
• Incognito indicator: a noticeable banner at the top now reminds you when reading history won't be tracked.
• Fixed library refresh: should be more stable/consistent now, as I've seen a lot of people with issues recently.
• Lots of other things! Check [the website](https://aidoku.app/release•notes/) for a more complete list.
